port.description: The container port to expose for single-container deployments.

exposePorts.description: Additional host port bindings for single-container deployments in the format "containerPort/protocol": "hostPort".

volumes.description: Bind mounts for single-container deployments in the format "/host/path:/container/path".

restartPolicy.description: Docker restart policy such as "unless-stopped" or "on-failure:2".

domain.description: Domain name routed to the deployment when no explicit Traefik rule is provided.

hostname.description: Internal hostname alias used on the Jig Docker network.

rule.description: Explicit Traefik rule to use instead of deriving one from domain. Example: "Host(`example.com`) && PathPrefix(`/api`)".

composeFile.description: Compose file to deploy. When set, Jig deploys the project with docker compose.

composeService.description: Primary routed service in legacy compose mode. Ignored for per-service x-jig deployments.

envs.description: Map of environment variables to set for the deployment. Secret values start with @.

middlewares.description: Traefik middleware configuration for the deployment.

noTLS.description: Disable the HTTPS router for the deployment.

noHTTP.description: Disable HTTP routing entirely. When true, the deployment becomes internal-only.

rateLimiting.description: Limit request rate for the deployment.

stripPrefix.description: Strip prefixes from the request path.

addPrefix.description: Add a prefix to the request path.

basicAuth.description: Basic auth credentials in Traefik users format.

then.description: Compose mode only supports a subset of top-level jig.json fields.
